title: Stamford Fantasy Mythical Incense Sticks – 12 Unique Fragrances (15 Sticks Each) with JRose Burner | Dragon’s Fire, Mermaid’s Love, Unicorn’s Grace & More | Aromatic Home & Meditation Set
features: 12 Enchanting Fragrances: This set features 12 unique and mystical scents including Dragon's Fire, Mermaid's Love, Pixie's Dance, Goblin's Lair, Unicorn's Grace, Werewolf's Bite, Angel's Touch, Witches' Curse, Demon's Lust, Fairy Mist, Vampire's Kiss, and Wizard's Spell.
High-Quality Incense Sticks: Each pack contains 15 premium-quality sticks that burn smoothly, providing hours of fragrance to enhance your space.
Complete Set with Incense Holder: Comes with an elegant JRose Incense Holder, designed to hold your incense sticks securely while they burn.
Perfect for Relaxation & Meditation: Whether you’re unwinding after a long day or meditating, these incense sticks help create a calming and serene atmosphere.
Ideal Gift Set: A beautiful gift for friends and family who enjoy aromatherapy, meditation, or mystical scents.
Eco-Friendly Packaging: Made with responsibly sourced materials, these incense sticks are packed in eco-friendly packaging, supporting a sustainable lifestyle.
description: Elevate your spiritual ambiance and transform any space with the Stamford Mythical Variety Set Incense Sticks. This set includes 12 unique fragrances, each carefully crafted to captivate your senses and create a tranquil atmosphere. With scents ranging from the fiery warmth of Dragon’s Fire to the mystical allure of Unicorn’s Grace, this set is perfect for meditation, relaxation, or simply adding a mystical touch to your surroundings. Each pack contains 15 premium-quality incense sticks that burn evenly and release a consistent fragrance for a long-lasting experience. As a special bonus, this set also includes a JRose Incense Holder, making it a complete package for your spiritual and aromatic needs. Indulge in the magical and mythical world of Stamford incense and awaken your senses. Specifications: Brand: Stamford Set Includes: 12 packs x 15 incense sticks each (180 sticks total) + JRose Incense Holder Burn Time: Approx. 30 minutes per stick Material: Premium-quality incense sticks Dimensions: 24 cm (length of each stick) Origin: Made in the UK Fragrance Profiles: Dragon's Fire: Bold and fiery with hints of spice. Mermaid's Love: Fresh, oceanic notes to soothe your senses. Pixie's Dance: Playful floral fragrance with a sweet undertone. Goblin's Lair: Earthy, grounding scent for deep relaxation. Unicorn's Grace: Light, airy, and magical with floral notes. Werewolf's Bite: Rich, woodsy fragrance with a dark twist. Angel's Touch: Delicate, heavenly floral notes to uplift your mood. Witches' Curse: Mysterious and exotic with herbal and woody elements. Demon's Lust: Sensual, intoxicating blend with warm, deep tones. Fairy's Mist: Enchanting blend with soft, misty floral notes. Vampire's Kiss: Deep and rich with an alluring, seductive aroma. Wizard's Spell: Spicy and mystical with a touch of magic.
